text: Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You’re approved as a mentor. Feel free to introduce yourself and check the mentorship resources when you have a moment.
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You’re approved as a moderator. Please review the moderation guidelines and say hi in introductions.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You’re approved as an event_helper. Jump into the events channel when you’re ready and introduce yourself.
